mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ai_analysis_record ( request_type, business_reference_id, initiator_employee_id, status, duration_ms, result_summary, audited_at ) VALUES ( #{requestType}, #{businessReferenceId}, #{initiatorEmployeeId}, #{status}, #{durationMs}, #{resultSummary}, #{auditedAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, request_type, business_reference_id, initiator_employee_id, status, duration_ms, result_summary, audited_at FROM ai_analysis_record WHERE id = #{id}
